title: Những Tin Đồn Xung Quanh Dahlia
notes: EN-asset-is-English case: message fields already English; title field still JP (en.json value empty) -> translated from JP source.
Speaker labels ダリア/少女/<user> kept byte-identical.
Daria calls Commander 親方/'Boss' -> Chỉ Huy (non-negotiable rule). Commander self-refers anh; addresses Daria em/anh.
In-dialogue name Daria romanized to canonical glossary name Dahlia.
Child (少女) addresses Commander おじさん -> ông già, and Daria おねえちゃん -> chị lớn.
SFX localized: ぐう->Khừ, *whimper*->*rên rỉ*, *sigh*->*thở dài*, *gasp*->*thở hắt*, ガチャッ->Rắc, Kyaa->Á.
Fullwidth ，converted to U+201A ‚ inside Vietnamese text fields.
counts mirrored exactly from EN asset (authoritative).
